quipHello: The boats run on schedule. Ish.
quipProjects: Every project was, at some point, a terrible idea that worked.
quipNotes: Written by a human, edited by deadline.
quip404: You are the first person to find this exact wrong URL. Probably.
heroKicker: Hiya — senior software engineer, Pittsburgh PA
heroHeadline: I help keep the lights on behind the news.
heroBody: Backend engineering at the Post-Gazette: building, planning, a healthy amount of boxes-and-arrows. Dad the rest of the time. Serial picker-upper of hobbies.
dict: 1. the Argo, but for one. 2. argc, but forever. 3. a sea of water, or of stars. 4. informal — what a method signature becomes if I'm not supervised.
